video.title: Giro d'Italia 2020 - Stage 12 Highlights | Cycling | Eurosport

transcript.clean_text: the jittered italia started and finished on stage 12 in chesinatico the home of the late marco pantani a difficult stage was in prospect four out of five stars according to the organizers eight big hills to take on five of them classified and most coming from pantani's old training roads and the very famous novecolli gran fondo the oldest in the world this year celebrating its 50th birthday over 200 kilometers as well could be a break could be for the gc a big day in prospect in filthy weather well some have dressed up better than others for it sunny at the start but forecast to rain for most of the day a big group of 14 riders got up the road with a gap of 13 and a half minutes that is until they started to ride behind ntt had a plan for domenico ports of evo and dylan sunderland was the first to go to work inside the last 50 kilometers the break was breaking up hadoon navis and clock with the latter being dropped padun and narvaez were in front just before the final climb had a new man from ukraine navis from ecuador potts of evo's attack did come but only in the final few hundred meters of the last climb of the day not enough to distance big rivals in the general classification that despite the fact that most leaders by that point were isolated also isolated at the front and suffering awful lot with a broken front wheel was padun and that allowed narabayas to extend his lead 15 kilometers to go and padun would work hard to bring back the gap to nine seconds but he was unable to pull the rope in his favor and when the tug of war ended it snapped to the front nadevae is winning that particular battle and the man only 23 years of age for the ineos grenadiers the former ecuadorian national champion became the second man from that nation to win a stage at this year's girl following on from yonatan a third stage win for the ineos grenadiers shocking luck for bahrain mclaren and mark padun and behind in the malayalasa group coming in over eight minutes from the winner there'd be no differences zacharin and pensteiner losing time and dropping down but none of the huge favorites having a bad day the glory belonged to yonatan narevaez and the ineos grenadiers a big day for them under the rain and outside the pantani statue a minute an eight they are margin of victory clark in third place in almost seven minutes chihuahua made her hanging on for another day not just hanging on but looking assured at his team wrapping him in cotton wool for most of the stage his lead's still 34 seconds going into stage 13 bilbao still on the podium at 43 seconds full sang back in the top 10 and we head to stage 13 which should be an opportunity for the sprinters with a few late lumps and bumps we leave the seaside behind for the final time at this judo all in land as we head to the mountains time trials and the stages will decide this race chair viator monsaliche 192 kilometers for stage 13. you
